full_text:
An update for man-pages is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The man-pages package provides man (manual) pages from the Linux Documentation Project (LDP).Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): man-pages: Prep for using Platform Tools patch management tooling [rhel-10] (JIRA:RHEL-101696)  man-pages: Errata work on RHEL-10.0.Z (2025:153778) (JIRA:RHEL-110569)
